name: Heart Disease
info: This data was generated using meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct. Original information: https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/145/statlog+heart
description: The datasetset contains clinical observations of heart disease, and the goal is to determine whether patients have heart disease based on these observations.

Age.description: age of the patient in years.

Fasting BS.description: indicator for whether the fasting blood sugar is greater than 120 mg/dl.

ST Slope.description: the slope of the peak exercise ST segment.
